# Somo Smart — AI-Powered Learning Platform

> Somo Smart is Kenya's leading AI-powered learning platform for CBC and KCSE students, teachers, and parents.

## What We Offer

- **AI Explanations**: Students scan textbooks or type any topic to get curriculum-aligned explanations with KCSE exam insights
- **Smart Quizzes**: AI-generated practice quizzes tailored to the Kenyan CBC/8-4-4 curriculum
- **Spaced Repetition**: Adaptive review system based on the SM-2 algorithm for long-term retention
- **Teacher Tools**: Lesson note generation, quiz creation, automated marking, and homework management
- **Resource Library**: Verified study materials, past papers, and syllabus guides for all CBC/KCSE subjects
- **Parent Portal**: Secure access for parents to monitor their child's study progress and quiz scores

## Subjects Covered

Mathematics, Science, English, Kiswahili, Social Studies, CRE, IRE, Agriculture, Business Studies, Computer Science, History, Geography, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Home Science

## Grade Levels

- CBC: Grade 1 through Grade 9 (Junior Secondary)
- 8-4-4: Form 1 through Form 4

## Pricing

- Free tier: 3 AI explanations per session
- Pro Monthly (KES 200): Unlimited explanations, quizzes, and downloads for 30 days
- Pro Term (KES 500): Unlimited access for 90 days
- Pro Annual (KES 1,500): Full year of unlimited access

## Target Audience

- Kenyan students preparing for KCSE, KPSEA, and CBC assessments
- Teachers in Kenyan primary and secondary schools
- Parents monitoring their children's academic progress

## Technical Details

- Built with React 19, Vite, Supabase, and Google Gemini AI
- Available at: https://somaai.co.ke
- Supports English and Kiswahili languages

## Contact

- Website: https://somaai.co.ke
- Location: Nairobi, Kenya
